name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: tonight at midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Let me get straight to the point.

We are choosing a new U.S. Senator in November! And we cannot afford to take the race for retiring Senator Barbara Mikulski's Maryland Senate seat for granted. Chris needs our energy, our time and our support.

Chris' opponent is posing as a "moderate". She wants us to believe her positions are reasonable and in-touch with Maryland values.

Nothing is further from the truth. Pull back the curtain and you can quickly see the razor-sharp contrast between her Trump-lite ideas and Chris's strong record of championing our priorities and standing up for our values.

Can you make a donation now to ensure Chris can get his message out across Maryland? >>>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $5 immediately >>

Donate $15 immediately >>

Donate $35 immediately >>

Donate $75 immediately >>

Donate $125 immediately >>

Or, donate another amount immediately >>

Chris's opponent has deep-pocket support from the NRA and Citizens United. And Washington Republicans have been busy hosting fundraisers for her.

To cap it off, while pretending she cares about working families, her biggest supporters in the Maryland Republican Party are having Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker, the poster child of the anti-working families campaign, keynote their annual fundraiser in September. It's shameless. It's hypocritical - and it's not Maryland.

Chris Van Hollen is the only candidate in this contest with an unequivocal track record on gun safety, getting dirty money out of politics, protecting the environment, standing up for Maryland's hardworking families and getting things done.

Can you help with an immediate donation? >>>

This one matters!

Thank you for helping Chris.

Maggie McIntosh
Maryland State Delegate
Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
You're receiving this email at: dpwillis67@gmail.com
If you'd like to unsubscribe visit: http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d18/738133e4/3060ffaf/7f853d21/3283945599/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160831pm4?refcode=pme160831pm4_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
Rubio said it himself. If we win in Florida, Republicans "will probably lose the Senate."

I'd like to amend that to say this -- if you step up, if we work harder than ever to win this race, and turn Florida blue, Republicans __will lose the Senate.__

The real work starts here and now, everyone. [_**Mandi told you earlier we need to raise $100,000 by midnight and we 're still $7,213 off the mark. Gifts are still being matched. Can you rush in a contribution?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d18/738133e4/3060ffaf/7f853d21/3283945599/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160831pm4?refcode=pme160831pm4_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Republicans losing the Senate is a good thing for Florida families. A Democratic Senate will protect Planned Parenthood, move forward with gun violence prevention measures, raise the minimum wage, and preserve access to affordable healthcare.

**But it 's an incredibly bad thing for Marco Rubio, the Koch brothers, and their special interest allies.** No more control means no more grandstanding, no more shielding special interests like the NRA or Big Oil.

We can make it happen. It all comes down to Florida. But we need to come out strong, and that starts by hitting our $100,000 goal by midnight.

[_**So I 'm asking you to pitch in whatever you can -- even if it's just $5 or $10 -- before time runs out. All gifts are still being matched.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d18/738133e4/3060ffaf/7f853d21/3283945599/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160831pm4?refcode=pme160831pm4_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

You can count on me to do my part. I hope I can count on you as well.

Thank you.

Patrick

name: Evan Bayh
subject: I'm proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, PO Box 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50468/7be36b49/1ef5db0f/78f880ba/1586762317/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I got into this race because I'm tired of all the divisiveness and obstruction I see in Washington.

That's what I'm hearing from my fellow Hoosiers, too -- that they're tired of the status quo. How about a senator who thinks less about partisan politics and more about what's going to bring the best benefit to Indiana?

Friend, my campaign is a grassroots campaign. **I 'm proud to have the support of thousands of folks just like you -- not special interests. **

But that means I have to call on you every so often and **[ask you to pitch in $5.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50468/7be36b49/1ef5db0f/78f880b9/1586762317/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-august-eom2?refcode=20160831.2nd&amount=10")** So that together, we can build a campaign to be proud of -- and one that wins.

My team tells me we need to raise another $1,933 before midnight to hit our August goal. In a "toss-up" election like this one, every dollar makes a difference.

I know we ask a lot, but if you're able, **[I'd really appreciate your chipping in $5 before midnight.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50468/7be36b49/1ef5db0f/78f880b9/1586762317/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-august-eom2?refcode=20160831.2nd&amount=10")**

Thank you for all you do,

Evan ******[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50468/7be36b49/1ef5db0f/78f880b8/1586762317/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-august-eom2?refcode=20160831.2nd&amount=25")******

subject: This is the plan to get Christians to the polls:
body: Peter, 25 million registered Christian voters did not go to the polls in 2012. We cannot let that happen again this year. As Honorary National Chairman of My Faith Votes, I am leading a full-throttle campaign to mobilize volunteers and reach millions before Election Day. I want to make sure you know what we're doing and how you can help. Our goal is simple -- to motivate believers to act on their faith by casting an informed vote based on a biblical worldview. If you're wondering how we plan to do it, we have 3 main approaches: National Church Initiative. We've developed a toolset for churches and faith-based ministries which includes a library of short but compelling videos, small group study resources, online pledge and registration tools, sermon outlines and more as a way for them to engage and motivate their people to vote with their biblical values. Advanced Data Mining. To turn out the 25 million Christians who didn't vote in 2012, we must get the right messages to the right people in the right places. To do so, we are leveraging data and research to refine our messages and target our activities in battleground states in the lead-up to Election Day. Aggressive Digital & Broadcast Media Promotion. We are creating a national movement of support for motivating and mobilizing the Christian vote through relevant and diverse media. This includes radio, TV and social media. I'm sharing this plan with you because I want you to know how strongly I feel about it. Our values are under attack like never before and I know in my heart that people are ready to get involved. name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: End Fracking on Public Lands
body:
Dear Activist,

Imagine starting out on a hike or driving through your favorite national forest, and this is your view: **swaths of trees that have been clearcut, hordes of trucks flying along back roads and fracking rigs scattered across the landscape**.

Because our public lands are currently open to fracking, this dirty and dangerous image could become more common for visitors to our national forests and wilderness areas. **[Sign the petition if you think our national forests and other public lands should be protected from fracking](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/VaFL/6/q/r5cs/6F1HC5/U5Zm4wSZva)**.

As a Colorado native, I am lucky to have the awe-inspiring Rocky Mountains and many areas of public land right in my backyard. Just the other weekend, I went hiking in Arapahoe National Forest. I cannot imagine going out and seeing a clearing with a huge fracking well pad, instead of these beautiful trees. [**Our national forests and public lands are too precious to frack**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/VaFL/s/q/r5cs/6F1HC5/vCm3DuHOC0).

**But fracking is already happening in national forests and public lands across the country** -- from Pennsylvania's Allegheny National Forest to the border of Glacier National Park; from illegal fracking in the Florida Everglades to George Washington National Forest in Virginia (which was recently approved for fracking).

**Thanks to the incredible opposition to fracking that has grown across the country** , U.S. Representative Mark Pocan (WI-2) and co-sponsor Jan Schakowsky (IL-9) introduced a bill to ban fracking on all public lands. **[This bill is the strongest piece of federal legislation against fracking to be introduced to date](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/VaFL/v/q/r5cs/6F1HC5/sPZRABQ5V7)**.

While Food & Water Watch members have already made it clear that fracking should be banned on our public lands (along with allies, we submitted more than 650,000 comments from people like you against the Obama administration's proposed rules for fracking on public lands), **the oil and gas industry is pushing back**. They will do everything they can to kill this bill so they can keep fracking our public lands.

**That 's why we need to make sure that this bill has an impressive list of co-sponsors and supporters in Congress. [Ask your representative to co-sponsor this bill to protect our public lands from fracking](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/VaFL/z/q/r5cs/6F1HC5/sQ20r8m7yu)**.

I want to be able to enjoy our parks and forests for years to come, and I want to make sure there will be protected wilderness for future generations to experience. **[Join me in standing up to protect our public lands from fracking today](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/VaFL/U/q/r5cs/6F1HC5/Nv4DKKMAn)**.

Thanks for taking action,

Caitlin Seeley George

Caitlin Seeley George
Online Organizer
Food & Water Watch
act(at)fwwatch(dot)org

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDYvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8xMjAyNjM2NA==)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Ben Carson
subject: The next phase...
body:
Peter,

Here at My Faith Votes, the next phase in the media plan to
motivate Christians to get to the polls in 2016 is to connect
with them directly on TV and radio.

Specifically, we will be running 25 radio and 35 television
Public Service Announcements across America with a compelling
message encouraging Christians to get to the polls and not stay
home in November. Here are 2 of the PSAs we've already developed.

www.myfaithvotes.com/psa/

We've already received agreement from several Christian networks
and there will be more to come.

If you can help us to raise the right amount of resources, we'll
be able to reach over 150 million households in the United
States. That's an incredible number of people.

When we set our previous goal of $90,000 for our student outreach
program, you helped us to blow right past it - and now we are
actively executing against that plan.

Our new goal that we absolutely must hit to develop and air our
PSAs is $200,000 and we're starting right now. Will you help to
get us started with a tax-deductible donation of any amount?

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=76

It may seem like a lot, and it is. But think about this -- 2012
was decided by just five million votes.

What if we fall short because we didn't have the ability to reach
those last few million voters? I don't want that to happen.

I know we've asked a lot, and we've asked often, but good work is
being done that I truly believe is going to pay off.

It's going to pay off not just in 2016 but also for years to
come, because we are building a true bottom-up movement of
believers.

I hope you will help to fund this next phase with a
tax-deductible donation now, and we'll be sure to share all of
our PSAs with you as they are developed.

myfaithvotes.z2systems.com/np/clients/myfaithvotes/donation.jsp?campaign=76

Thanks for your ongoing generosity and commitment, and God bless
you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Brian Zuzenak, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Get out in Clifton on Thursday!
body:
| Derek --

We're getting together in Clifton on September 8th, and we want you to join.

Hillary Clinton’s historic nomination was only the first step in our long and steep journey to the White House, and now, there is more work to be done to elect her and other Democrats to Congress (and state houses). We cannot grow complacent. It’s more important than ever to come together, talk to voters, and discuss the issues that matter most in this election. Please join us on Thursday.

Hillary said it best, “None of us can raise a family, build a business, heal a community or lift a country totally alone.”

As we all know, this is not a normal election -- if we don’t do everything we can to help Hillary win, Donald Trump will take the Oath of Office in January. This is a time when we all need to pull together and get out in our communities because we know that is how elections are won.

Friend, **"Gubernatorial candidate Greg Gianforte has taken Montana politics in an ugly direction."** \-- _Bozeman Chronicle Editorial Board_ In a blistering editorial, Greg Gianforte's local newspaper took him to task for his latest fear-mongering attacks.

[**Show you agree and donate $15 to send a message to Greg Gianforte that these kinds of scare tactics won't be tolerated.**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tWmvbzrhq9XWc95KwhzM1g2sGD%2FlW47n)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Let’s take our message all the way to the White House. |

Peter, Last night, I delivered to you a ten-point policy plan to STOP illegal immigration. I also put to rest so many rumors spread by the mainstream media about my policies on illegal immigration. For the past week, they’ve distorted my views and even went so far as to claim that we won’t build an actual wall. So disgraceful. As I said last night, we ARE going to build a tall, physical, impenetrable, beautiful wall along the southern border to stop the influx of illegal immigration. But the media is spreading these false rumors in the hopes of pitting us against each other. They know that the only way to take down our movement is to divide us. They see the growing momentum on our side and will try anything to stop us. Peter, I’m turning to you, one of my bedrock supporters, to make a contribution of $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to prove that our movement is more united and stronger than EVER before. The media is hoping to turn the story away from the fact that Hillary Clinton would offer full-blown amnesty to tens of millions of illegal immigrants and would keep the border unsecured for millions more to flow right over. I’m proposing a plan that will uphold the rule of law and enforce the laws already on the books. But to get our detailed, ten-point plan to the American voter, we’re going to need your help cutting through the media’s noise. Please, contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to push our movement to victory this November and finally put an end to the major problem of illegal immigration. Thanks, Donald J. We blew past our end-of-month goal. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf44d6/1c469400/753e3cd/35764ff/1945991794/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-09-01_eomaug_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-01_eomaug_nd&utm_campaign=eomaug&utm_medium=ema") Friend, $29\. That's how big our average online contribution was for the month of August. And because of your grassroots support, we blew past our end-of-month goal of raising $150,000. **That's the power of this grassroots team. body:
Let’s take our message all the way to the White House. |

Peter, Last night, I delivered to you a ten-point policy plan to STOP illegal immigration. I also put to rest so many rumors spread by the mainstream media about my policies on illegal immigration. For the past week, they’ve distorted my views and even went so far as to claim that we won’t build an actual wall. So disgraceful. As I said last night, we ARE going to build a tall, physical, impenetrable, beautiful wall along the southern border to stop the influx of illegal immigration. But the media is spreading these false rumors in the hopes of pitting us against each other. They know that the only way to take down our movement is to divide us. They see the growing momentum on our side and will try anything to stop us. Peter, I’m turning to you, one of my bedrock supporters, to make a contribution of $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to prove that our movement is more united and stronger than EVER before. The media is hoping to turn the story away from the fact that Hillary Clinton would offer full-blown amnesty to tens of millions of illegal immigrants and would keep the border unsecured for millions more to flow right over. I’m proposing a plan that will uphold the rule of law and enforce the laws already on the books. But to get our detailed, ten-point plan to the American voter, we’re going to need your help cutting through the media’s noise. Please, contribute $100, $65, $35, $25, or even $15 to push our movement to victory this November and finally put an end to the major problem of illegal immigration. Thanks, Donald J. name: TEAM COLE
subject: BILL COLE OUTLINES PLAN TO CREATE GOOD PAYING JOBS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

Today during a speech to the West Virginia Business Summit, Bill Cole outlined his plan to create good paying jobs in our state. He made it clear that he supports Donald Trump for President because he will allow our miners to go back to work, let us harness our natural gas, and free us of the impossible roadblock to growth that is the EPA. Bill's opponent Jim Justice has donated more than $60,000 to President Obama's re-election effort and has said he stands united with Hillary Clinton.

In outlining his plan, Bill Cole told the crowd:
_Our great state is at a turning point. We face challenges with our economy, our education system and the opioid epidemic. As your Governor, I will
face them head on and restore our great state to prosperity.

_The ** _Bill Cole Plan to Create Good Paying Jobs_ **will focus on:

_Workforce Readiness_ : As Governor, Bill Cole will realign our job training programs to ensure that every West Virginian has access to the training and skills to get a job and every employer has access to a skilled workforce. _Producing Energy:_ Bill Cole supports Donald Trump for President because he will allow our miners to go back to work, let us harness our natural gas, and free us of the impossible roadblock to growth that is the EPA. _Regulatory Reform_ : In 2015, _Forbes_ magazine rated West Virginia’s regulatory environment last in the nation. In 2016, Bill Cole responded by enacting the _Regulatory Reform Act_ that improved the rule-making process and required a review of all state regulations. As a result, the legislature identified and repealed 172 time-consuming and unnecessary regulations. While much has been done to improve the regulatory environment, it falls to the Governor to effectively eliminate burdensome regulations and cut red tape. Bill Cole will foster an environment where businesses can be competitive. _Creating a Statewide High-Speed Broadband Access:_ As Governor, Bill Cole will bring the private sector together to complete the middle mile and make sure that every community has access to high-speed broadband. _Implementing a Manufacturing Strategy:_ The average manufacturing job pays $68,000 per year and spins off 7 additional jobs. The impact of a vibrant and robust manufacturing sector will put West Virginians back to work in good paying jobs and bring stability to the state’s budget. The manufacturing strategy will leverage our natural gas reserves to produce affordable energy and build cracker plants and pipelines that will attract and create downstream manufacturing operations; target our economic development efforts towards other manufacturing industries in which West Virginia can provide the right location and workforce; focus on regulatory reform – especially those rules that have a particular negative impact on manufacturing; and close the skill gap that exists between our workers and the preparation they need to provide prospective manufacturers with a trained, educated workforce. _Establishing a New Approach to Economic Development_ : Bill Cole will create the _West Virginia Economic Development Corporation_ , _Inc.,_ a 501(c)(3), public/private partnership between government and the business community that would assume responsibility for all of our state’s economic development efforts. The corporation will be governed by a board of directors and tasked with coordinating all of the key functions of government for the sole purpose of creating prosperity and integrate the private sector and other stakeholders in the decision-making process; operated as a well-run business instead of a traditional government agency. It will be designed to respond quickly and definitively to economic opportunities and challenges while moving the state’s economy forward; take the lead in promoting entrepreneurship and assisting the small business community. _Spurring Growth Through Our Universities:_ Bill Cole will create the _West Virginia Research Endowment_ that will focus on attracting world-class researchers to our colleges and universities. Through the endowment, West Virginia can become a hub for the self-sustaining, entrepreneurial researchers whose investigation and innovation will lead to the creation of new products, new processes and new technologies.

Bill Cole has a proven record as a job creator with over thirty years in business. His limited four year's working to reform state government and make it more competitive and job friendly has convinced him that with the right plan and the right people working together, West Virginia can write the next chapter of the American Comeback Story. Together we can once again become _West Virginia Proud and West Virginia Strong_.

clean_body: Hi there, I'm Debra Messing, an actor and progressive advocate, and recently I was introduced to Governor Maggie Hassan at the Democratic National Convention's Women's Caucus in Philadelphia. She's fought to protect women's health care rights, ensure LGBTQ equality, and make college more affordable in New Hampshire -- now she's running for the U.S. Senate. Her race is one of the closest and most important in the country, because the outcome will almost certainly decide control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court. "" I'm struck by Maggie's powerful guiding principle -- that the more people we bring in from the margins, the more successful we are as a country. It's a simple, inspiring thought that we need to see more of in government. But that won't happen if we don't act. Washington Republicans are doing everything they can to stop her, so it's up to you and me to help Maggie fight back. "" Thanks, Debra P.S. -- Isn't this photo from the DNC Women's Caucus fun?
